ping
Patch Set 11: Code-Review+2

Patch Set 11:

ping!
Patch Set 11: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 11:

Frank, we are just in code freeze for 2.7.0 so only critical patches are landing right now. Normal patch landings will resume in a week or two.

Patch Set 11:

This is getting ridiculous. This patch has been ready for more than 5 months now, and it's still not merged. What is holding it up?

Patch Set 11:

Frank, as I wrote in my last comment, landings were frozen until 2.7.0 was finished, which delayed landing by about 4 weeks.

Patch Set 11:

I know Andreas. But this patch was ready long before the 2.7 branch was closed. I don't want that to happen again with the 2.8 release. It should take days, not months to have such a patch upstreamed.

Patch Set 11:

I'd like to add that there is a second patch like this one also waiting in gerrit.

And I have a third one that I haven't bothered pushing yet, because what's the point? Upstreaming a patch in Lustre is a very frustrating experience.

Patch Set 11:

Its much better than it used to be. The wide stripe feature took 3 years to land. It time you get use to the landing process.

Patch Set 11: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

parents.subject: LU-6285: o2iblnd: Do not use cpus_weight, it's deprecated

commit.subject: LU-5710 corrected some typos and grammar errors
commit.message:
LU-5710 corrected some typos and grammar errors

Most of them are in comments, but there was a few in user
visible help.

Change-Id: Ib050e9042f9f2728cd3eeedeee679739b48419db
Signed-off-by: frank zago <fzago@cray.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/12201
